title: 菊花賞の後に・虚ろなる焔

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki isn't able to win. It's possible the
distance is what made her struggle so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, there's no shame in the loss,
but Yaeno Muteki laments what she calls a
disgraceful performance. She couldn't light the
competitive fire inside her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I point out that it might have something to do
with Mejiro Ardan and Sakura Chiyono O's
absence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back at the Japanese Derby, she stoked her
competitive spirit to a raging inferno to defeat
them. But her desire to win today just can't
compare to the obsession she held back then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Obsession... it becomes clear that is what Yaeno
Muteki needs in order to improve. For now, we
decide to continue training as we have been to
prepare for our next goal, the Osaka Hai.
